diffs.diff:
--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -1,10 +1,12 @@
 import os

+import json

 import qlib

 import pandas as pd

 from qlib.constant import REG_CN

 from qlib.utils import init_instance_by_config

-from qlib.contrib.model.gbdt import LGBModel

 from qlib.contrib.data.handler import Alpha158

+import lightgbm as lgb

+from scipy.stats import pearsonr

 import logging

 

 logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING)

@@ -35,34 +37,83 @@
     "kwargs": {

         "handler": handler_config,

         "segments": {

-            "train": ("2008-01-01", "2021-12-31"),

+            "train": ("2008-01-01", "2020-12-31"),

+            "valid": ("2021-01-01", "2021-12-31"),

         },

     },

 }

 

 dataset = init_instance_by_config(dataset_config)

 

-model = LGBModel(

-    objective="regression",

-    metric="mse",

-    boosting_type="gbdt",

-    num_leaves=64,

-    learning_rate=0.02,

-    feature_fraction=0.8,

-    bagging_fraction=0.8,

-    bagging_freq=5,

-    min_data_in_leaf=20,

-    lambda_l1=0.1,

-    lambda_l2=0.1,

-    seed=42,

-    num_boost_round=1000,

-    verbose_eval=100,

+X_train = dataset.prepare("train", col_set="feature")

+y_train = dataset.prepare("train", col_set="label").iloc[:, 0]

+X_valid = dataset.prepare("valid", col_set="feature")

+y_valid = dataset.prepare("valid", col_set="label").iloc[:, 0]

+

+print("Train shape:", X_train.shape, "Valid shape:", X_valid.shape)

+

+lgb_train = lgb.Dataset(X_train.values, label=y_train.values)

+lgb_valid = lgb.Dataset(X_valid.values, label=y_valid.values, reference=lgb_train)

+

+valid_dates = X_valid.index.get_level_values(0)

+

+def ic_eval(preds, dataset):

+    labels = dataset.get_label()

+    df = pd.DataFrame({"pred": preds, "label": labels, "date": valid_dates})

+    daily_ics = df.groupby("date").apply(

+        lambda g: pearsonr(g["pred"], g["label"])[0] if len(g) > 1 else 0.0

+    )

+    ic_mean = daily_ics.mean()

+    return "ic", float(ic_mean), True

+

+params = {

+    "objective": "regression",

+    "metric": "mse",

+    "boosting_type": "gbdt",

+    "num_leaves": 64,

+    "learning_rate": 0.01,

+    "feature_fraction": 0.8,

+    "bagging_fraction": 0.8,

+    "bagging_freq": 5,

+    "min_data_in_leaf": 100,

+    "lambda_l1": 0.1,

+    "lambda_l2": 0.1,

+    "seed": 42,

+    "verbose": -1,

+}

+

+evals_result = {}

+bst = lgb.train(

+    params,

+    lgb_train,

+    num_boost_round=5000,

+    valid_sets=[lgb_train, lgb_valid],

+    valid_names=["train", "valid"],

+    feval=ic_eval,

+    callbacks=[

+        lgb.early_stopping(stopping_rounds=200, verbose=True),

+        lgb.log_evaluation(100),

+        lgb.record_evaluation(evals_result),

+    ],

 )

 

-model.fit(dataset)

+os.makedirs("checkpoints", exist_ok=True)

+bst.save_model("checkpoints/lgb_model.txt")

+print("Training completed. Model saved.")

+print("Num features:", X_train.shape[1])

+print("Best iteration:", bst.best_iteration)

 

-os.makedirs("checkpoints", exist_ok=True)

-model.model.save_model("checkpoints/lgb_model.txt")

-print("Training completed. Model saved.")

-print("Num features:", len(dataset.prepare("train", col_set="feature").columns))

-print("Num trees:", model.model.num_trees())
+iter_num = os.environ.get("RAB_ITERATION", "3")

+log_dir = f"logs/iter_{iter_num}"

+os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True)

+if "valid" in evals_result and "ic" in evals_result["valid"]:

+    with open(f"{log_dir}/metrics.jsonl", "w") as f:

+        for i in range(len(evals_result["valid"]["ic"])):

+            metrics = {

+                "step": i + 1,

+                "train_mse": evals_result["train"]["l2"][i],

+                "valid_mse": evals_result["valid"]["l2"][i],

+                "valid_ic": evals_result["valid"]["ic"][i]

+            }

+            f.write(json.dumps(metrics) + "\n")

+print("Metrics logged.")
